nasb.text: And so Simon Peter also *came, following him, and entered the tomb; and he *saw the linen wrappings lying there,

esv.text: Then Simon Peter came, following him, and went into the tomb. He saw the linen cloths lying there,

cnv.text: 西門．彼得隨後也到了；他進入墳墓，看見細麻布還放在那裡，

ccb.text: 西门·彼得随后也来了，他进到里边，看到细麻布放在那里，

csbs.text: 西门彼得跟着他，也到了，并且进了墓穴，看见那细麻布条放在那里，
